titles.en: Clarification of the Transmission Chain to Ubaydullah Al-Rafaqi

text: ه عن عبيد اللّه الرّافقيّ‌ فقد رويته عن جعفر بن محمّد بن مسرور- رضي اللّه عنه- عن الحسين بن محمّد بن عامر، عن عمّه عبد اللّه بن عامر، عن أبي أحمد محمّد بن زياد الأزديّ، عن عبيد اللّه الرّافقيّ‌.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications: Everything in this book that is narrated from Ubaydullah Al-Rafaqi has been transmitted by me from Ja'far ibn Muhammad ibn Masrur - may Allah (swt) be pleased with him - from Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad ibn 'Amir, from his uncle Abdullah ibn 'Amir, from Abu Ahmad Muhammad ibn Ziyad Al-Azdi, from Ubaydullah Al-Rafaqi.
